mapper.select: select count(1) from logistics_order where date(created_at) = current_date and customer_id = #{customerId}
select count(1) from logistics_order where status in ('COMPLETED', 'SIGNED', 'DELIVERED') and customer_id = #{customerId}
select count(1) from logistics_order where status = 'WAIT_DISPATCH' and customer_id = #{customerId}
select count(1) from logistics_order where status in ('PICKED', 'IN_TRANSIT') and customer_id = #{customerId}
select count(1) from logistics_exception where exception_status != 'CLOSED' and order_id in (select id from logistics_order where customer_id = #{customerId})

select coalesce(sum(payable_fee), 0) from logistics_fee where payment_status = 'PAID' and date_format(update_time, '%Y-%m') = date_format(current_date, '%Y-%m') and order_id in (select id from logistics_order where customer_id = #{customerId})
select status, count(1) as total from logistics_order group by status order by status

select e.id, e.order_id as order_no, e.exception_type, e.exception_desc, e.exception_status, e.report_user, e.report_time from logistics_exception e where e.exception_status != 'CLOSED' and e.order_id in (select id from logistics_order where customer_id = #{customerId}) order by e.report_time desc limit 10

select c.id, c.employee_id as employeeId, c.contract_no as contractNo, date_format(c.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as endDate from hr_contract c where c.contract_status = 1 and c.end_date is not null and c.end_date between current_date and date_add(current_date, interval #{days} day)
select count(1) from logistics_order where date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m') = date_format(date_sub(current_date, interval 1 month), '%Y-%m') and customer_id = #{customerId}

select count(1) from logistics_exception where date_format(report_time, '%Y-%m') = date_format(date_sub(current_date, interval 1 month), '%Y-%m') and order_id in (select id from logistics_order where customer_id = #{customerId})
